channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-164] Update the test framework so that it can append to yaml files rather than begin a new series - and allow auster to begin at a selected test_suite.
item.description:
When a test times out it is necessary to reset the test cluster, but it would also be useful to carry on with further test suites, to do this the test_framework must be able to append to an existing yaml log.

It is also a requirement that auster have a switch to mark the first suite to run.
item.summary: Update the test framework so that it can append to yaml files rather than begin a new series - and allow auster to begin at a selected test_suite.

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-dev » x86_64,client,el6,inkernel #340
LU-164 test: Update testframework to restart sessions at next suite (Revision b031b90a0320401db1ae474c4cbd89226bf5f2c9)

Result = SUCCESS
Oleg Drokin : b031b90a0320401db1ae474c4cbd89226bf5f2c9
Files :

  • lustre/tests/test-framework.sh
  • lustre/tests/auster
